'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 16''' was published in [[January]] [[1979]] by [[Paradise Press]].

This was the first issue to be edited by [[John May]], and to have [[John Chesterman]] as contributing editor.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Fan Club Facts", by [[John May]]: an article on the Official ''[[Star Wars]]'' Fan Club.
*"Activate Memory Circuits—It's the Star Wars Quiz", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a trivia quiz for fans.
*"[[Cantina Communications]]," by [[John Chesterman]]: a vignette where [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] observe the diversity of [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and their various [[Language/Legends|methods of communication]]. This article marks the first and only appearance of several alien species, such as the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] ocean of [[Solanus]], the giant algae beds of the [[Cygnus B system]], [[Klytonian]]s, a particular species of [[olfax]]es, and an unidentified species of emotionless multiple-eyed insectoids described as the best [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] in the galaxy. More mundanely, it also mentions [[Dog/Legends|dogs]].
